title: これ、スタックしている？ • 現在タスクは thin-core を維持したまま drift 耐性と自動反 映を次段まで進めること として扱います。まず現行の lane 可 用性を current-run で確認し、6 本の active lane を立てて から実装に入ります。 • Spawned Feynman [reviewer] └ [phase:plan] [family:layering] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: continue Kernel hardening without increasing always-loaded con...
summary_text: **Findings** - High: `blocked` semantics are partially dropped across the dispatch boundary. `run-linked-systems` computes `blocked_count` internally but does not include it in `client_payload`; only `success_count`/`error_count` are sent ([run-linked-systems.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L304)). Receiver template also only reads `SUCCESS_COUNT`/`ERROR_COUNT`, so blocked states cannot be quantified downstream ([fugue-result-receiver.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/templates/fugue-result-receiver.yml#L27)). - High: Main CI gate does not enforce the new linked/backup regression tests. `tests/test-linked-systems-exit-contract.sh` and `tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` exist, but are not invoked in `fugue-orchestration-gate.yml` ([tests dir](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L254)). **Minimal Fix Set** 1. Add `blocked_count` to `dispatch_payload.client_payload` in [run-linked-systems.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L304). 2. Update [fugue-result-receiver.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/templates/fugue-result-receiver.yml#L25) to ingest and render `BLOCKED_COUNT` (and optionally use `⚠️` when `STATUS=blocked`). 3. Add both tests to main gate in [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L254): `bash tests/test-linked-systems-exit-contract.sh` and `bash tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh`. No code edits performed.
